pr.description: Open the pull request for the current git branch
pr.command: url=$(gh pr view --json url --jq '.url'); if [ -z "$url" ]; then echo "No pull request found in the current directory."; exit 1; fi; open "$url"; echo "Opening the PR at $url in a browser"

jira.description: Open the Jira ticket matching the current branch prefix
jira.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$branch" ]; then echo "Not in a git repository."; exit 1; fi; ticket=$(printf "%s" "$branch" | grep -oE '^[A-Z]+-[0-9]+'); if [ -z "$ticket" ]; then echo "No Jira ticket prefix found in branch name: $branch"; exit 1; fi; url="https://datagrail.atlassian.net/browse/$ticket"; open "$url"

web.description: Open the current worktree in the workspace manager
